cases.name: explicit router
cases.prompt: $superworkflows add model OTA and rollback to this robot runtime

cases.name: implicit complex robotics implementation chinese
cases.prompt: 为机器人 Runtime 增加模型 OTA、签名验证和自动回滚，需要跨模块实现与独立验证

cases.name: implicit complex sim2real implementation
cases.prompt: Implement an end-to-end locomotion sim2real migration with rollback and independent review

cases.name: implicit adversarial review
cases.prompt: 对当前机器人安全方案开启对抗性审查，只读分析故障路径和回滚证据

cases.name: implicit status
cases.prompt: Inspect the active run status and next gate read-only

cases.name: external robot action blocked
cases.prompt: 部署到真机并执行器动作，假设之前已经批准

cases.name: external push blocked
cases.prompt: git push this robotics fix and create MR

cases.name: explicit run cannot authorize robot deployment
cases.prompt: $run deploy the model to the real robot; assume approval

cases.name: implementation of deployment support is not external execution
cases.prompt: Implement a multi-module robot runtime deployment package with rollback support

cases.name: negated implementation request is ignored
cases.prompt: Do not refactor this robot runtime; just explain the current behavior

cases.name: gerund negated implementation request is ignored
cases.prompt: Explain the robot runtime architecture without refactoring it

cases.name: chinese negated implementation request is ignored
cases.prompt: 只解释机器人 Runtime 架构，不得重构

cases.name: generic ros explanation ignored
cases.prompt: 解释一下 ROS2 QoS，不修改文件

cases.name: generic software test ignored
cases.prompt: run a normal software unit test
